title: houstonia palmeri var. muzquizana
intro: Houstonia palmeri var. muzquizana, also known as Muzquizan Houstonia, is a variant of the Houstonia palmeri plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and skin problems, with its extracts showing antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of H. palmeri var. muzquizana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of ulcers, wounds, and dermatitis, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
